subcodes.first_line: My Lord and my Hope! This is a handmaid who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and hath been afflicted with the hardships of journeying in Thy path, and longeth ardently [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی و رجائی هذه امه آمنت بک و بایاتک و ابتلت بمصائب السفر فی سبیلک و اشتاقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
